name: Sandvik AB
description: Sandvik AB is a global, high-tech engineering group that provides solutions to enhance productivity, profitability, and sustainability for the manufacturing, mining, and infrastructure industries. Founded in 1862 and headquartered in Sweden, the company specializes in advanced products and services, including metal cutting tools, rock drilling and excavation equipment, and crushing and screening technology. With a strong focus on innovation and digitalization, Sandvik serves a diverse international customer base, helping them optimize their industrial processes and achieve greater efficiency in demanding operational environments.
